---
title: "Read in Methods Figure"
author: "Kendra Wyant"
date: "`r lubridate::today()`"
number-sections: true
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true 
    toc_depth: 4
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
html-table-processing: none
---


```{r}
#| label: fig-methods
#| fig-cap: "Add description."
#| fig-width: 7

knitr::include_graphics(path = here::here("figures/methods.jpg"))
```
